blocks.code:
(define agents (get (rb-state "agents.json") "agents"))
(define ids (keys agents))
(define (archetype id) (or (get (get agents id) "archetype") "unknown"))
(define archetypes (map archetype ids))
(define (tally lst counts)
  (if (null? lst) counts
    (tally (cdr lst)
      (dict-set counts (car lst)
        (+ 1 (or (get counts (car lst)) 0))))))
(tally archetypes (dict))
